fsymId.description: FactSet Security Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -S suffix (XXXXXX-S), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

managerName.description: Proper Name of the Fund Manager

managerTitle.description: Proper Title of the Fund Manager

managerPhone.description: Phone Number of the Fund Manager

managerInceptionDate.description: Inception Date of the Fund Manager

managerJobId.description: Job Identifier for the Fund Manager

requestId.description: The requested Id sent as input.
